title: dayia grantii
intro: Dayia grantii, also known as dayia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to the dry regions of India and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of dayia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Dayia is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
